import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Cloud, Sprout, ShoppingBag, Building2, Map, FileBarChart, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Phone, Send, ChevronRight, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; import './Dashboard.css'; const marketPrices = [ { icon: '🌾', name: 'Rice', price: '₹2800 / Quintal', change: '+2.5%', up: true }, { icon: '🍅', name: 'Tomato', price: '₹32 / Kg', change: '-1.2%', up: false }, { icon: '🧅', name: 'Onion', price: '₹28 / Kg', change: '-0.8%', up: false }, { icon: '🌿', name: 'Cotton', price: '₹7600 / Quintal', change: '+1.5%', up: true }, ]; const forecast = [ { day: 'Today', icon: '⛅', temp: '31°C', rain: '20%' }, { day: 'Tomorrow', icon: '🌧️', temp: '30°C', rain: '40%' }, { day: 'Sunday', icon: '☀️', temp: '32°C', rain: '10%' }, { day: 'Monday', icon: '☀️', temp: '33°C', rain: '0%' }, { day: 'Tuesday', icon: '☀️', temp: '34°C', rain: '0%' }, ]; const schemes = [ { icon: '👨‍🌾', name: 'PM Kisan Samman Nidhi', desc: 'Direct income support', color: '#fff3e0', border: '#ff9800' }, { icon: '🛡️', name: 'PM Fasal Bima Yojana', desc: 'Crop insurance scheme', color: '#e8f5e9', border: '#4caf50' }, { icon: '💧', name: 'PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana', desc: 'Irrigation support', color: '#e3f2fd', border: '#2196f3' }, { icon: '💳', name: 'Kisan Credit Card', desc: 'Easy credit for farmers', color: '#f3e5f5', border: '#9c27b0' }, ]; const quickActions = [ { icon: Cloud, label: 'Weather', color: '#3b82f6' }, { icon: Sprout, label: 'Crop Advisor', color: '#22c55e' }, { icon: ShoppingBag, label: 'Market Prices', color: '#f59e0b' }, { icon: Building2, label: 'Schemes', color: '#8b5cf6' }, { icon: FileBarChart, label: 'Reports', color: '#06b6d4' }, { icon: Map, label: 'Maps', color: '#ef4444' }, ]; const aiQuestions = [ '🌱 Which crop is suitable now?', '🌿 Best fertilizer for rice?', '🌧️ Will it rain tomorrow?', ]; export default function Dashboard({ setActivePage }) { const [chatInput, setChatInput] = useState(''); const [chatMessages, setChatMessages] = useState([]); const handleSend = () => { if (!chatInput.trim()) return; setChatMessages(p => [...p, { text: chatInput, user: true }]); setChatInput(''); setTimeout(() => { setChatMessages(p => [...p, { text: 'Thank you for your question! Our AI is analyzing your query about farming conditions in West Godavari, AP.', user: false }]); }, 800); }; return (
